headlines.headline: Urvel Grid sees 5% drop in new customer orders this quarter

headlines.headline: Ixenix Technologies explores strategic alternatives for digital payments unit

sentiment.reasoning: Exploring strategic alternatives for a unit suggests a potential divestiture or restructuring, which can be positive if it streamlines operations or unlocks value, but also introduces uncertainty.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
